steps.t: Thranduil has asked you to head to Loeglond. You should leave Felegoth.
Galion wishes to speak with you inside Felegoth. You should talk to Galion.
Loeglond can be found between Eryn Lasgalen and the Dale-lands. You should travel to Loeglond.
Lorndúr can be found in Loeglond. You should talk to Lorndúr.
